basic_details.job_title: FACT Inquiry Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore Limited (FACT)
basic_details.short_information: The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore Limited (FACT) has officially announced the Inquiry Officer Recruitment 2026. The detailed notification was published on 13 May 2026 at fact.co.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of Max: 69 years and hold a Graduation from an AICTE approved / UGC recognized University with experience in conducting departmental inquiries can now submit their offline applications from 13 May 2026 to 01 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply offline are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age limit: 69 years as on 01/05/2026, engagement limited up to 70 years.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit: 69 years as on 01/05/2026. Engagement is limited up to 70 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation from AICTE approved / UGC recognized University/Deemed University.
qualification.details: Graduation from AICTE approved / UGC recognized University/Deemed University. Separated from service on account of superannuation, voluntary retirement, or resignation from a Government Department/Government Autonomous Body/Public Sector Undertaking, having held a substantive managerial position in E4 scale or above. Experience in conducting departmental inquiries, having handled at least one inquiry as an Inquiry Officer in a Government Department/PSU. Experience in conducting departmental inquiries in Public Sector Undertakings will be added advantages. Adequate knowledge of the law, rules and procedures for conducting Departmental Inquiries in connection with Disciplinary Action in Government departments/ PSU.

salary_details.pay_scale: Lump Sum per inquiry: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 50,000/-; Secretarial assistance: Rs. 5,000/- to Rs. 10,000/-; Transport allowance: Rs. 1000/- to Rs. 1750/-.
salary_details.details: Lump Sum per inquiry: Rs. 30,000/- (where number of witnesses up to 5), Rs.40000/- (where number of witnesses in the range of 6 – 10), Rs. 50000/- (where number of witnesses more than 10). Secretarial assistance per inquiry: Rs. 5,000/- (where number of witnesses up to 5), Rs. 7500/- (where number of witnesses in the range of 6 – 10), Rs. 10000/- (where number of witnesses more than 10). Transport Allowance per sitting: For those residing up to 100 kms Rs.1000/-, For those residing beyond 100kms and up to 200 kms – Rs.1500, For those residing beyond 200 kms Rs.1750/-. Common/Joint Inquiries: 50% additional amount on the Lumpsum amount (ie Rs.45000 / Rs.60000 / Rs. 75000, as the case may be) shall be paid, where the number of Charged Officers/Chargesheeted employees involved is more than two.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for FACT Inquiry Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.fact.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the FACT Inquiry Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the FACT Inquiry Officer recruitment is 01-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Inquiry Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduation degree from an AICTE approved or UGC recognized University/Deemed University to be eligible for the Inquiry Officer position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Inquiry Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Inquiry Officer post is 69 years as on 01/05/2026. The engagement is limited up to 70 years of age.

faq.question: Q4. How will the Inquiry Officer be compensated?
faq.answer: The compensation is a lump sum per inquiry, ranging from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- based on the number of witnesses. Additional allowances for secretarial assistance and transport are also provided.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the designated address via post.

faq.question: Q6. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Contract-based job role as an Inquiry Officer at FACT.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this FACT Inquiry Officer recruitment is 03/2026.

faq.question: Q8. What experience is required for the Inquiry Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have retired from a Government Department/Autonomous Body/PSU, held a managerial position (E4 scale or above), and have experience conducting departmental inquiries.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of FACT, www.fact.co.in. Links are also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
